# Test basic class field access patterns with a Person class
class Person:
    name: str
    age: int
    is_student: bool

    def __init__(self, name: str, age: int, student: bool):
        self.name = name
        self.age = age
        self.is_student = student

def main():
    p: Person = Person("Alice", 25, True)
    print(p.name)
    print(p.age)
    print(p.is_student)
    
    p.age = 26
    p.is_student = False
    print(p.age)
    print(p.is_student)

# EXPECTED OUTPUT:
# Alice
# 25
# True
# 26
# False
